hints.title: Hint 1
hints.content: Consider how to determine whether the median of an interval equals $$$x$$$.

hints.title: Hint 2
hints.content: What could be the median of each subsequence?

solutions.title: Tutorial
solutions.content:
2222C - Median Partition
Consider how to determine whether the median of an interval equals $$$x$$$. Let the count of values less than $$$x$$$ be $$$a$$$, the count of values equal to $$$x$$$ be $$$b$$$, and the count of values greater than $$$x$$$ be $$$c$$$. We then require: $$$a+b \gt c$$$ and $$$b+c \gt a$$$.
Note that the median of all intervals is the same as the median of the original sequence. The proof can consider that if they are equal to another integer $$$y$$$, assuming it is divided into $$$k$$$ segments, the number of $$$ \lt y$$$ as $$$a_1,a_2,a_3,...,a_k$$$ and the number of $$$=y$$$ as $$$b_1,b_2,b_3,...,b_k$$$ must be greater than $$$c_1,c_2,c_3,...c_k$$$ when summed. Similarly, the entire sequence also satisfies this condition, $$$b+c \gt a$$$.
Therefore, we only need to design $$$f_i$$$ to represent the maximum number of segments into which the first $$$i$$$ numbers can be divided, transitioning from all $$$j  \lt  i$$$ where the median of $$$[j+1, i]$$$ is the original median.

solutions.title: Implementation
solutions.content:
#include
<iostream>
#include
<cstring>
#include
<algorithm>
#include
<cmath>
using
namespace
std
;
const
int
N
=
5e3
+
10
;
int
n
,
a
[
N
],
b
[
N
],
mid
,
dp
[
N
];
void
run
(){
cin
>>
n
;
for
(
int
i
=
1
;
i
<=
n
;
i
++)
cin
>>
a
[
i
];
memcpy
(
b
+
1
,
a
+
1
,
n
<<
2
);
sort
(
b
+
1
,
b
+
n
+
1
);
mid
=
b
[(
n
+
1
)>>
1
];
for
(
int
i
=
1
;
i
<=
n
;
i
++){
if
(
a
[
i
]==
mid
){
a
[
i
]=
0
;
continue
;
}
a
[
i
]=(
a
[
i
]>
mid
?
1
:-
1
);
}
for
(
int
i
=
1
,
flg
=
0
;
i
<=
n
;
i
++){
dp
[
i
]=
0
;
flg
=!
a
[
i
];
if
(
flg
and
(
i
==
1
or
dp
[
i
-
1
]))
dp
[
i
]=
dp
[
i
-
1
]+
1
;
for
(
int
j
=
i
-
3
,
sm
=
a
[
i
];
j
>=
0
;
j
-=
2
){
flg
+=!
a
[
j
+
1
];
flg
+=!
a
[
j
+
2
];
sm
+=
a
[
j
+
1
]+
a
[
j
+
2
];
if
(
abs
(
sm
)>=
flg
or
(
j
and
!
dp
[
j
]))
continue
;
dp
[
i
]=
max
(
dp
[
i
],
dp
[
j
]+
1
);
}
// cout<<dp[i]<<" \n"[i==n];
}
cout
<<
dp
[
n
]<<
'\n'
;
}
int
main
(){
cin
.
tie
(
0
);
cout
.
tie
(
0
);
ios
::
sync_with_stdio
(
0
);
int
T
;
cin
>>
T
;
while
(
T
--)
run
();
}
